title: IN-Meetings transcript.json
description: Per-meeting merged transcript. The stable contract consumed by the Claude skill stack (saventa-summary, generate-mom, process-meeting) via their --package mode (ADR-005). Forward-compatible: consumers MUST ignore unknown fields; new fields are added additively and tracked by metadata.json.schema_version.

meeting_id.description: Stable id, also the local folder name; matches metadata.json meeting id.

profile.description: Capture profile (ADR-011). call = dual-track; inPerson = mic-only.

biased.description: Whether context-injection biasing was applied (Phase 2). false at MVP.

diarized.description: Whether diarization produced real speaker turns (slice 4c). false = coarse track-level labels only.

side.description: internal = IN team (mic), external = counterparty (system); unknown for single-track in-person speakers.

track.description: Source audio track. Additive vs the Timeless shape; skills may ignore.

name.description: Resolved display name (Phase 2 calendar match). null until matched.

email.description: Resolved email (Phase 2 calendar match). null until matched.

utterances.description: Time-ordered utterances across all tracks (ADR-005; equivalent to Timeless items[]).

start.description: Start time in seconds from recording start.

end.description: End time in seconds from recording start.

confidence.description: ASR confidence 0..1; null until captured. Enables the number-sanity skill check (ADR-005).
